## tscli create invite user

Create a user invite

### Synopsis

Invite a user to the current Tailscale tailnet with an optional role.

```
tscli create invite user [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --email string   E-mail address to invite (required)
  -h, --help           help for user
      --role string    User role: owner|member|admin|it-admin|network-admin|billing-admin|auditor (default "member")
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
  -k, --api-key string   Tailscale API key
  -d, --debug            Dump HTTP requests/responses
  -o, --output string    Output: [json yaml human pretty]
  -n, --tailnet string   Tailscale tailnet (default "-")
```

* [tscli create invite](tscli_create_invite.md)	 - Create invite commands
